channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Zimbabwe needs 1,2 million FMD vaccine doses
item.description: via The Herald ZW #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald ZW

item.title: Kuda Tagwirei’s Son and His Bride Showered With Over US$20 Million in Cash, Land and Luxury Wedding Gifts
item.description: Kuda Tagwirei’s Son and His Bride Showered With Over US$20 Million in Cash, Land and Luxury Wedding Gifts A lavish wedding ceremony involving the family of businessman Kudakwashe Tagwirei turned into a showcase of extraordinary wealth after newlyweds Taonanyasha John Tagwirei and via Iharare News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Nigeria Cricket Federation appoints Zimbabwean coach Stephen Mangongo to lead Yellow Greens
item.description: News Velocity NG The Nigeria Cricket Federation (NCF) has appointed Veteran Zimbabwean tactician Stephen Mangongo as the new head coach of the Yellow Greens, ending months of speculation over who would succeed former coach Steve Tikolo. Mangongo is also expected to serve as the f via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Afreximbank backs Zimbabwe SMEs with $15m financing @afreximbank
item.description: Africa Business Communities Afreximbank has extended a USD 15 million SME Finance Facility to Ecobank Zimbabwe Limited to support small and medium enterprises operating across export value chains in Zimbabwe. The funding will provide working capital and capital expenditure financ via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Econet Vic Falls Marathon set for biggest edition yet
item.description: THE 2026 Econet Victoria Falls Marathon is shaping up to be the biggest edition in the event’s history, after major race categories sold out nearly two months before race day,... The post Econet Vic Falls Marathon set for biggest edition yet appeared first on The Financial Gazett via The Financial Gazette #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Financial Gazette

item.title: Simbisa bets big on deliveries, solar push as fuel shock squeezes margins @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Simbisa bets big on deliveries, solar push as fuel shock squeezes margins – herald Tapiwanashe Mangwiro Fast-food giant Simbisa Brands Limited is accelerating its delivery business, expanding its store network and doubling down on solar energy investments as regional fuel via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: SADC moves to plug 1,6m tonne fish gap @zimsituation
item.description: Source: SADC moves to plug 1,6m tonne fish gap – herald Thesus Shambare SADC countries are accelerating efforts to modernise fisheries and aquaculture systems as the region confronts a fish deficit estimated at 1,6 million tonnes. This gap threatens food security and the liveliho via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Zimbabwe lands major conservation funding
item.description: Yvonne Ncube in BULAWAYO ZIMBABWE has secured fresh conservation fund­ing under phase four of the KfW-supported Kavango Zambezi Transfrontier Conservation Area (Kaza... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of you via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Climate #Environment #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Zimbabwe deports 28 Mozambican teens, visually impaired man engaged in street vending and begging
item.description: Zimbabwe has deported twenty-nine undocumented Mozambican nationals after they were intercepted in Chipinge, Mutare and Harare and found to be in the country illegally. The group was received at the Machipanda Border Post by a Mozambican multi-sectoral team comprising Migration S via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Will Zimbabwe’s lithium strategy help it break into the value-adding game?
item.description: South China Morning Post Zimbabwe is betting that its move into lithium processing will finally break the cycle of digging and shipping ore that has defined its mining sector for decades. This follows the export of the continent’s first consignment of lithium sulphate by Prospect via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
